items.title: Integrated Science — Human Body Systems
items.subject: Integrated Science
items.description: Complete notes on all human body systems: digestive, respiratory, circulatory, excretory, nervous, and skeletal systems with labeled diagrams.

items.title: Mathematics — Fractions and Decimals
items.subject: Mathematics
items.description: Detailed notes on operations with fractions, converting fractions to decimals, and solving word problems involving fractions and decimals.

items.title: English — Parts of Speech
items.subject: English
items.description: Notes covering all eight parts of speech: nouns, pronouns, verbs, adjectives, adverbs, prepositions, conjunctions, and interjections with examples.

items.title: Social Studies — Government of Kenya
items.subject: Social Studies
items.description: Notes on the structure of the Kenyan government: national and county governments, arms of government, and the Constitution of Kenya 2010.

items.title: Kiswahili — Sarufi: Ngeli za Nomino
items.subject: Kiswahili
items.description: Maelezo kamili kuhusu ngeli za nomino katika lugha ya Kiswahili. Inajumuisha mifano na mazoezi ya kufanyia mazoezi.

items.title: Integrated Science — Electricity and Magnetism
items.subject: Integrated Science
items.description: Notes on electric circuits, Ohm's law, series and parallel circuits, electromagnets, and practical applications of electricity.

items.title: Agriculture — Crop Production
items.subject: Agriculture
items.description: Notes covering land preparation, planting, crop maintenance, harvesting, and post-harvest handling. Includes common crops grown in Kenya.

items.title: Mathematics — Quadratic Equations
items.subject: Mathematics
items.description: Complete notes on solving quadratic equations by factorisation, completing the square, and using the quadratic formula. Includes worked examples.
